Underworld: Blood Wars (2016)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $30,353,973Details
International Box Office $50,855,249
Worldwide Box Office $81,209,222
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $7,644,268
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $7,729,217
Total $15,373,485
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Death dealer Selene must fend off brutal attacks from both the Lycan clan and the vampire faction that betrayed her. Joining forces with allies David and Thomas, she embarks on a quest to end the eternal war between the two races, even if it means making the ultimate sacrifice.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$13,688,751 (45.1% of total gross)
Legs:2.22 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:37.4% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$35,000,000 (worldwide box office is 2.3 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,070 opening theaters/3,070 max. theaters, 2.8 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $40,471,958

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: January 6th, 2017 (Wide) by Sony Pictures
International Releases: November 25th, 2016 (Wide) (Russia (CIS))
November 28th, 2016 (Wide) (South Korea)
November 30th, 2016 (Wide) (Indonesia)
December 1st, 2016 (Wide) (Malaysia)
December 1st, 2016 (Wide) (Chile)
Video Release: April 25th, 2017 by Sony Pictures Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: R for strong bloody violence, and some sexuality.
(Rating bulletin 2454 (Cert #50103), 12/7/2016)
Running Time: 91 minutes
Franchise: Underworld
Film format: 3-D, 3-D - Post-production Conversion
Plot point: Betrayal, Monster, Vampire, Werewolf
Social setting: Urban Gothic
Subgenre: Action Horror
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Action
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Fantasy
Production/Financing Companies: Lakeshore Entertainment, Screen Gems
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
